历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were 15502 → 14085 → 18673 → 14392 → 15346, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2023, due to special reasons, the ranking significantly dropped to 18673, rebounded to 14392 in 2024, and then moved back to 15346 in 2025. The fluctuation range has been large in recent three years, with the baseline ranking for 2025 approximately 15346. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Chongqing has been increasing year by year: 81 in 2021, 76 in 2022, 87 in 2023, 88 in 2024, and 90 in 2025. The plan for 2026 increases to 96, an expansion of 6.7% compared to 2025, which is relatively significant and helps alleviate competition pressure, leading to a tendency for rankings to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest A&F University is a Project 985, Project 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 76th in 2021 → 74th in 2022 → 74th in 2023 → 73rd in 2024 → 71st in 2025 → 69th in 2026, indicating a continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, there was an incident of academic misconduct by a teacher, which had a negative impact on reputation, but no significant negative public opinion has emerged since. The overall popularity on Douyin ranks 75th, rated as 'average', with exposure on short video platforms at a moderately low level. There have been no records of admission line drops or crashes in recent years, and the application psychology is relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, four disciplines—Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grass Science—were rated A-, all core agricultural and forestry disciplines closely related to the university's enrollment majors. Although Landscape Architecture is not listed in the A category, it is a characteristic specialty of the university and has some appeal to candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication have consistently high social popularity. The university's related majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information Engineering) rank high in the Physics Category and are highly competitive. The total number of examinees in Chongqing in 2026 is approximately 209,000, slightly decreasing from 212,851 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 136,895, a decrease of about 583 from 139,478 in 2025, indicating a slight decline in the candidate base. The university is located in Xianyang City, Shaanxi Province, not a local university in Chongqing, so there is no local enrollment preference. The willingness of Chongqing candidates to apply for agricultural and forestry 985 universities is relatively stable, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the baseline ranking of 15346 in 2025, the 6.7% enrollment expansion to 96 in 2026 (ranking shift backward by about 614 places), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (driving ranking forward), and the slight decrease in Physics Category examinees in Chongqing (slightly easing competition), combined with the dominant effect of enrollment expansion and the slight offsetting effect of ranking improvement and candidate reduction, the predicted minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 15980, with a range of 15501–16459.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 15980, with a range of 15501–16459. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (15501) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 15980) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (16459) are recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively friendly rankings. The university's advantageous agricultural and forestry disciplines (Crop Science, Plant Protection, etc., A- disciplines) correspond to majors mostly in Tier 2, suitable for candidates interested in agricultural and forestry fields.
